panels.title: Key Info
panels.content:
⭐ Optimized route to get **B, A, and A+ endings in a single playthrough**. Requires the Goods Knowledge prerequisites listed in the Walkthrough tab.

💡 **Key mechanics:** Save at every stop from step 11 onward. Scout prices by traveling ahead, then reloading to buy at the starting town — prices are fixed at game start. You have ~37 moves after choosing a companion and need ~18 companion events.

panels.title: Optimized Route
rows: Load clear data. Skip tutorials.
Lenos → buy 5 Cookies. Go to Diemoln.
Diemoln: complete all ! events. Take out 1,000 silver loan. Pay 3,000 silver to informant (unlock Beorein). Don't buy/sell. Go to Beorein.
Beorein: complete all ! events. Sell everything, buy 5 Mussels. Save game.
Need Special: Chicken rumor before reaching Lune. Travel Erne → Delintskolz. If no Chicken rumor, reload to Beorein.
Delintskolz: complete all ! events. Go to Lune.
Lune: complete all ! events. Sell Mussels. Repay loan, take another (reset timer). Buy 3 Chickens + 3 Eggs (or 2 Chickens + eggs if short). Save game.
Need Popular: Chicken rumor before returning to Beorein. Head back via Delintskolz → Erne. Reload to Lune if needed.
Beorein: complete ! events. Sell Eggs + Chickens. Buy 5 Mussels, 1 Salt (if available), Oysters. Return to Lune.
Lune: complete ! events. Sell everything. Pay off loan. You should have 4,000+ silver. Buy 3 Straps + 3 Chickens. Go to Delintskolz.
Delintskolz: choose companion. **From here save at every stop.** You have ~37 moves and need ~18 successful events. Scout prices ahead.
Erne: sell everything. Save. Buy 3 Jerky + 1 Goat.
Ulrich: get town rumor for Graha (reload if not obtained). Complete ! events.
Graha: pay 1,000 silver informant. Sell everything. Save. Buy 3 Wheat Bread.
Ruvinheigen: visit (no Inn needed — skip Amati's challenge in A+ run).
Lamtra: sell everything, buy Alchemy Pot. Save. Buy 1 Coffee + 1 Parchment + 1 Sulfur (scout ahead for best combo).
Leyage: companion should reach Intimacy C here. Pay informant if possible. Start taking out loans again.
Ulrich: deliver Alchemy Pot. Sell everything. Save. Buy 4 Cloves (scout ahead).
Leyage: pay informant if you haven't yet.
Lenos: upgrade cart +1 slot (500 silver). Sell everything, buy Distiller + 2 Nutmegs.
Leyage: pass.
Ulrich: deliver Distiller. Don't sell anything. Buy a Clove if possible.
Erne: pass.
Delintskolz: loan due today — sell everything, pay loan. Don't take a new loan yet. Buy 1 Mead + 2 Pepper + 1 Onion (or 2 Pepper + 1 Beer + 1 Onion if no Mead).
Lune: pay informant.
Gahno: sell everything, buy Furnace + 3 Brandys (take loan if needed).
Lune: pass.
Delintskolz: sell Brandy. Buy 2 Peppers + 1 Onion.
Erne: pass.
Ulrich: deliver Furnace. Sell everything else. Buy 1 Sandalwood + 3 Cloves.
Erne: pay informant.

Beorein: new companion events start appearing. Raise companion toward top of B intimacy. **Do NOT reach A yet.** (Check if she reached A by watching for automatic intimacy event — if it triggers, reload.)
Diemoln: sell everything. Pay loan, take new loan. Buy 1 Myrrh + 2 Caviar + 2 Silverware.
Beorein: pass.
Erne: sell everything. Buy 3 Jerky + 1 Goat.
Delintskolz: pay informant.
Bourattia: sell Jerky + Goat. Buy 1 Opium. You should now be able to repay loan (scout ahead to confirm).
Liberkant: pay informant.
Rossalt: buy 1 Powdered Lily.
Liberkant → Ulrich: deliver all ingredients.
Erne → Delintskolz → Lune: you'll get the 6-month warning en route but still have time. Finish ! events at Lune.
Delintskolz → Erne → Beorein: don't choose the ! option yet — that ends the game.
43–END

Get 3 endings in one run: ① Save at Beorein with companion at B → end game → save clear data (**B ending**). ② Reload → get remaining events to reach A intimacy → save → end game → save clear data (**A+ ending**). ③ Reload → wander until June/July → end game (**A ending**). Now you have 3 of 4 endings.
